description: Roleplay prompt: create a drag-and-drop experience using UniApp
template: I want to create a drag-and-drop experience using UniApp, where cards can be dropped into a washing machine for cleaning. It should include drag-and-drop feedback, background bubble animations, gurgling sound effects, and a washing machine animation.1. Play the “gulp-gulp” sound.2. The card gradually fades away. 12.3. A pop-up message reads, “Clean!”.4. Bottom update: “Cleaned X items today” statistics.
